source_families.title: Microsoft Graph
search_hints: site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph REST API
site:learn.microsoft.com Entra OAuth2 client credentials
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph security API
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph security authorization
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph alerts incidents security
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph runHuntingQuery secureScore threatIntelligence
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph SharePoint sites lists drives
site:learn.microsoft.com Microsoft Graph SharePoint listitem create delete driveitem
source_families.notes: Use official Graph and Entra docs first. Prefer v1.0 docs unless the task explicitly requires beta. For security work, route requests by capability family such as alerts, incidents, hunting, secure score, or threat intelligence. Before planning a security integration, separate app-only versus delegated authorization and confirm whether Microsoft Entra role assignment is required in addition to Graph permissions. For SharePoint work, separate site discovery from list CRUD and drive or file CRUD.

Separate report and dashboard behavior, data-source and refresh design, semantic modeling, governance, embedding, Copilot, DirectQuery, paginated reporting, mobile layout, and scorecards into distinct entries. Use the learning-path directory as a scenario router when a request is persona-driven, such as admin, developer, DirectQuery, paginated reporting, or metrics.

source_families.title: PowerShell Automation And Scripting
search_hints: site:learn.microsoft.com PowerShell Invoke-RestMethod retry rate limit
site:learn.microsoft.com PowerShell SecretManagement Azure Key Vault
site:learn.microsoft.com Azure Automation runbook Managed Identity PowerShell
site:learn.microsoft.com Windows Task Scheduler PowerShell scheduled task
site:pnp.github.io PnP PowerShell Connect-PnPOnline SharePoint
site:github.com dfinke ImportExcel Export-Excel conditional formatting
site:github.com EvotecIT PSWriteHTML New-HTML table report
site:learn.microsoft.com PowerShell Export-Csv encoding NoTypeInformation
source_families.notes: Covers cross-cutting PowerShell automation patterns not tied to a specific vendor API: HTTP client wrapper patterns, retry and rate-limit handling, credential management (Key Vault, SecretManagement, Managed Identity), report generation (ImportExcel, PSWriteHTML, CSV), and scheduling (Task Scheduler, Azure Automation). Vendor-specific PowerShell patterns (e.g., PowerShell for Qualys) belong in the vendor's source family but reference these cross-cutting entries. Prefer official Microsoft docs for built-in cmdlets, GitHub repos for community modules (ImportExcel, PSWriteHTML, PnP.PowerShell).
